outputEntry.text: Atomic Energy Act Authorization; RCRA Subtitle C Permit; CERCLA ROD (if remediation); Clean Air Act NESHAP Subpart H; SDWA UIC Permit; Nuclear Waste Policy Act; NHPA Section 106; ESA Section 7

USACE; USFWS; EPA; SHPO; State DOT
